parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  properties: {
    email: $json.email,
    firstname: $json.name,
    phone: $json.phone,
    company: $json.company,
    jobtitle: $json.role,
    website: $json.website,

    lifecyclestage: "lead",

    numemployees:
$json.employees === "1-5" ? "1-5" :
$json.employees === "5-25" ? "5-25" :
$json.employees === "25-50" ? "25-50" :
$json.employees === "50-200" ? "100-500" :
$json.employees === "200-500" ? "100-500" :
"100-500",

    message: $json.message,
    lead_source: $json.source
  }
}) }}
